name: translational-diligence-workbench
description: Translational Diligence Workbench — monorepo workspace root

scripts.fixture:all: npm run fixture:sting && python -m pipeline.run_workflow --config configs/cases/parp_breast.yaml --mode fixture && python -m pipeline.run_workflow --config configs/cases/tau_alzheimers.yaml --mode fixture && python -m pipeline.run_workflow --config configs/cases/iaip_sepsis.yaml --mode fixture
scripts.build:ri:combined: python3 -m pipeline.build_ri_precedents && npm run enrich:ri:biomcp && python3 -m pipeline.enrich_ri_comp_sites --seed-fixture && python3 -m pipeline.build_ri_combined
scripts.build:ri:artifacts: PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.bootstrap_ri_cases_enriched && PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.suggest_ri_cases_enriched && PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.enrich_ri_comp_sites --seed-fixture && PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.build_ri_combined --from cases-enriched
scripts.build:ri:artifacts:legacy: PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.build_ri_precedents && PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.enrich_ri_comp_sites --seed-fixture && PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.build_ri_combined --from legacy
scripts.ri:cases:biomcp: PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.enrich_ri_biomcp --tier A --refresh && npm run ri:cases:biomcp:apply
scripts.ri:cases:enrich:trials: PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.enrich_ri_cases_trials && npm run ri:cases:build
scripts.ri:cases:enrich:physicians: PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.enrich_ri_cases_physicians && npm run ri:cases:build
scripts.ri:cases:enrich:package: PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.apply_tier_a_comps_to_enriched --tier A && PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.enrich_ri_cases_physicians && npm run ri:cases:build
scripts.ri:cases:enrich:comps: python3 -m pipeline.build_ri_precedents && PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.enrich_ri_cases_comps --fetch-urls && python3 -m pipeline.export_ri_cases_enriched_json
scripts.ri:cases:tier-a:pass: PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.ri_biomcp_publications && python3 -m pipeline.apply_tier_a_comps_to_enriched && python3 -m pipeline.remediate_ri_cases_enriched && npm run ri:cases:build
scripts.ri:cases:enrich:comps:seed: python3 -m pipeline.build_ri_precedents && python3 -m pipeline.enrich_ri_cases_comps && python3 -m pipeline.export_ri_cases_enriched_json
scripts.ri:cases:enrich: npm run ri:cases:biomcp:apply && npm run ri:cases:vivo && npm run ri:cases:enrich:web
scripts.ri:cases:build: PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.export_ri_cases_enriched_json && PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.build_ri_combined --from cases-enriched
scripts.ri:cases:refresh: npm run ri:cases:bootstrap && npm run enrich:ri:biomcp -- --tier A && npm run ri:cases:biomcp:apply && npm run ri:cases:validate && npm run ri:cases:build
scripts.tier:a:build: PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.tier_a.validate_sources && PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" python3 -m pipeline.build_ri_precedents
scripts.tier:a:verify: PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" npm run tier:a:sync-seeds && npm run tier:a:build && npm run build:ri:artifacts && npm run validate:ri:tier-a -- --no-web
scripts.tier:a:comps:seeds: python3 -m pipeline.tier_a.run_seeds_web_review && python3 -m pipeline.tier_a.comp_web_review apply && PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PATH}" npm run tier:a:build
scripts.publish:ri:full: npm run batch:ri:fixture && python -m pipeline.build_opportunity_bundle --sync-cases && npm run build --workspace=web
